{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Eithan's defense
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] has a layer of [[pure madra]] coating his skin.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
